interface_zones.name: Roof-to-Wall Transition
interface_zones.description: Interface where roofing system meets vertical wall assembly. Critical for water, air, and thermal continuity.

interface_zones.name: Parapet Transition
interface_zones.description: Interface at parapet walls where roof membrane terminates and wall cladding begins.

interface_zones.name: Penetration
interface_zones.description: Any point where pipes, conduits, structural members, or equipment pass through the building enclosure.

interface_zones.name: Fenestration Edge
interface_zones.description: Perimeter interface around windows, doors, curtain wall frames, and glazing systems.

interface_zones.name: Below-Grade Transition
interface_zones.description: Interface where above-grade wall assembly transitions to below-grade waterproofing.

interface_zones.name: Expansion Joint
interface_zones.description: Designed movement joint accommodating differential structural movement between building sections.

interface_zones.name: Deck-to-Wall Transition
interface_zones.description: Interface where horizontal deck or plaza assembly meets vertical wall.

interface_zones.name: Roof Edge
interface_zones.description: Perimeter edge condition including fascia, drip edge, gravel stop, or coping.

interface_zones.name: Curb Transition
interface_zones.description: Interface where roof membrane transitions up and over equipment curbs, skylights, or hatches.

interface_zones.name: Drain Transition
interface_zones.description: Interface at roof drains, scuppers, and overflow points where membrane connects to drainage hardware.
